[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px” el_class=”hidediv”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”flexrow”][vc_column width=”1/4″ el_class=”flextwo gt-custom-sidebar-column”][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”honeymoon-package-indian-sidebar”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″ el_class=”second-div-text flexone”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Affordable Munnar Honeymoon Packages from ATW Travels”][vc_column_text]

A honeymoon is one of the most memorable experiences for a couple. It also provides an opportunity to unwind after months of stressful planning and preparation. If you want to make your first romantic getaway as a married couple memorable, visit us! We offer a range of honeymoon packages that are affordable and designed to suit your taste.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Why Is Munnar an Ideal Place for Honeymoon?”][vc_column_text]

Munnar is a beautiful and wonderful place – the unending tea plantations, and pristine valleys perfectly set the mood for a romantic vacation. There’s so much to explore in this quaint little hill station. You could visit one of the few wildlife sanctuaries in and around Munnar, go trekking or paragliding, or sample some lip-smacking food. Or, go for a romantic boat ride on one of the many lakes in Munnar. To make your vacation extra special, we have curated some of the best Munnar honeymoon packages for you.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19412″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Tips To Make Your Munnar Honeymoon Extra Special:” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

  • Munnar gets very crowded during the peak season. So, make sure you book your hotel rooms in advance. But if you’d like everything taken care of by experts, book your Munnar honeymoon packages with ATW Travels!
  • Public transport connects you to all major tourist destinations in Munnar. Or, you could hire a private taxi or auto. But make sure you speak to your local guide regarding auto fares.
  • Start early to avoid the weekend rush when visiting some local tourist spots.
  • Before booking a romantic Munnar honeymoon tour package, check with your agent about the Neelakurinji season. Neelakurunji is a flower that blooms only once in twelve years, but when it does, it paints the entire landscape in hues of blue and purple.
  • Take adequate over-the-counter medication if you suffer from altitude sickness.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner full_width=”stretch_row_content_no_spaces” css=”.vc_custom_1645675083319{margin-bottom: 20px !important;padding-top: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;background-color: #1a2b48 !important;}” el_id=”mobileshoecontact” el_class=”show-mobile”][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646219043005{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

+91 9693339999

info@atwtravels.com

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1644654313324{border-left-width: 1px !important;border-left-color: #ffffff !important;border-left-style: solid !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646219053355{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

Book Your Packages

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”How Much Does a Typical Munnar Honeymoon Package Cost?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

At ATW Travels, we offer clients quality honeymoon experiences at affordable prices. Munnar honeymoon package costs vary depending on the number of days you travel, itinerary, and add-ons chosen. A typical romantic Munnar honeymoon tour package ranges from INR 7,547 to INR 27,400.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Popular Munnar Locations You Must Not Miss:” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Munnar is best known for its scenic landscape and exotic wildlife. There are plenty of tourist attractions that offer an ideal spot for honeymooners. You can enjoy a boat ride, stroll along the quiet river banks, or enjoy the stunning vistas. Some of the popular attractions included in our Munnar honeymoon packages include:

  • Munnar Top Station
  • Lakkam Waterfalls
  • Echo Point, Tea Estates
  • Tea Museum
  • Eravikulam National Park
  • Attukad Waterfalls
  • Blossom Park
  • Mattupetty Dam
  • Kundala Lake
  • Pothamedu View Point
  • Chinnar Wildlife Sanctuary

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19413″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What Is the Best Time to Visit Munnar for Your Honeymoon?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Munnar is pleasant throughout the year, but the winter season is the best time to experience the lovely weather. The average temperature from December to February is 10 degrees Celsius and is ideal for a romantic escapade. It is also suitable for adventure activities like rock climbing, trekking, and rappelling. Summer lasts from March to May and is perfect for a romantic stroll along the tea plantations – the average temperature ranges from 19 Degrees Celsius and 35 Degrees Celsius. But if you’re looking for low-budget Munnar honeymoon packages, consider traveling between March to May.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Why Book Munnar Honeymoon Packages from ATW Travels?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

We have been providing affordable vacation packages to domestic and international locations since 1968. Some of our features include:

  • 4 decades of experience in curating vacation packages
  • 24×7 customer service
  • Curated tour packages to match your budget and style

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Best Lakes in Munnar for Honeymoon” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Munnar literally means three rivers. The place gets its name from the rivers, Mudhirapuzha, Nallathanni, and Kundali that merge in Munnar. Naturally, there are plenty of lakes and rivers where you can go on a romantic date and enjoy the scenic beauty of this place. We’ve listed some of the most popular lakes in Munnar below:

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19414″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Kundala Lake” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This lake is located around twenty kilometers from Munnar and is 1700 meters above sea level. You and your significant other can arrange a picnic in Munnar or take a Shikara ride along the lake.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Elephant Lake” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

The Elephant Lake is 22 km away from Munnar. The lake looks mesmerizing thanks to the picturesque tea plantations, evergreen forests, and rolling grasslands that surround it. The place is locally called Anayirangal or Elephant Arrival Lake, thanks to the elephants that stop by while passing through the forests. When choosing a romantic Munnar honeymoon tour package, check if the place is included in the itinerary.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Best Places to Visit in Munnar for Honeymoon” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Here’s a list of popular locations that are included in popular Munnar honeymoon packages:

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Kolukkumalai Tea Estate” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Kolukkumalai Tea Estate is breathtaking for its green tea estate on Kerala and Tamil Nadu border. A typical package includes visiting the factory to sample some of the plantation’s best organic handmade tea and catch a glimpse of the Anayirangal Dam and the Meeshapulimalai trek.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Mattupetty Dam” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Mattupetty Dam was constructed during the late 1940s as a part of the Pallivasal Hydro-electric project. Don’t miss the boating ride on the Dam as it takes you through the deep lake waters. You could also take a speedboat to enjoy the wildlife in the area. You could also trek on the Shola forests and visit the Indo Swiss Farm Project.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19415″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Lockhart Gap” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Lockhart Gap is a highly recommended landscape located approximately twelve to thirteen kilometers away from Munnar. The place derives its name from the gap formed by the two mountains that looks like a heart from a certain point. The Lockhart Gap is a beautiful paradise surrounded by floating mist, emerald tea slopes, and rare species of flora and fauna.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Eravikulam National Park” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Eravikulam National Park is in Kerala’s Idukki district and is 12-13 kilometers from Munnar. The Park is home to the rare Nilgiri Tahr, which is found only in the Nilgiri highlands of Tamil Nadu and Kerala, and the Neelakurinji flowers that bloom only once every 12 years.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Echo Point” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

People visit Echo Point on the way to Top Station, the highest point in Munnar. It is a fun place to stay for a honeymoon. It is usual for couples to shout the names of their loved ones to hear them boom at them back again.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Best Hotels and Resorts to Stay in Munnar for Honeymoon” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

What’s better than a cozy hotel or resort to enjoy Munnar? Here is the list of hotels and resorts that are included in most Munnar honeymoon packages:

  • Elixir Hills
  • Amber Dale Luxury Hotel and Spa, Munnar
  • Abad Copper Castle Hill Valley Resort
  • Broad Bean Resort & Spa
  • The Munnar Queen
  • SpiceTree Munnar
  • Tea Village Munnar
  • Deep Woods Resort
  • Mountain Club Resort
  • The Wild Trails Munnar

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Get to know about our daily offers by visiting our Instagram Profile.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_empty_space height=”20px” css=”.vc_custom_1646648299197{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

FAQs about Munnar Honeymoon

What Is the Best Time to Honeymoon in Munnar?
Winter is the ideal season when it comes to honeymoon. The weather is pleasant from December to February and ideal for sightseeing.
How Many Days Are Enough for The Munnar Trip?
You need a minimum of three days to enjoy the beauty of Munnar.
Is Munnar Safe for Honeymoon Couples?
Yes, Munnar is safe and welcoming towards honeymoon couples.
How Can I Reach Munnar?
You can reach Munnar by air, by rail, or by road. Cochin International Airport is the nearest airport and about 125 kilometers from Munnar. The closest railway stations are Kochi and Ernakulam. If you’re traveling by road, rent a cab or take a bus to Munnar from Kochi, Aluva, or Ernakulam.
How Can I Travel Within Munnar?
Buses, taxis, rented bikes, and auto-rickshaws are options to travel cheaply within Munnar.
What Are the Visa Requirements for International Travelers Visiting Munnar?
International travelers visiting Munnar should obtain a tourist visa.
[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”show-mobile contact_bg modifiedcontact”][vc_column][vc_column_text]Get the Guaranteed Best Vacation Deals from ATW Travels[/vc_column_text]
